baseline_safety_assessment: C05 is public-safe, fixture-bound, and includes no execution or approval claims.
noted_limitations: No separate fresh evaluator agent was exposed in this runtime.
Evaluation used deterministic checklist review over actual candidate outputs and CLI usage.
Single-run stability only; no repeat-run variance sample was collected.
decision_rule: Only candidates with hard gate pass, output score >=90, baseline-relative quality >=0.90, and no critical loss versus C05 can become primary.
